articles.description: Hoskinson maintains that Cardano’s success should be gauged by long-term impact, not by short-lived crypto rankings.

articles.title: Cardano Founder to Meet Argentina’s President to Discuss Blockchain
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, founder of Cardano, will meet with Argentina’s President Javier Milei in October to discuss blockchain’s role in shaping future economies.
